# Kalkan - iOS Spam Call Blocker & Caller ID

> Kalkan is a free iOS application that blocks spam calls and identifies unknown phone numbers. It uses iOS Call Directory Extension to load a spam database directly on the device for offline protection. No access to contacts or call history.

## About Kalkan

Kalkan is developed for iPhone users in Turkey who want protection from spam calls, scam calls, and unknown callers. The app is particularly designed for:

- **Children** — Protection from unknown and suspicious callers
- **Elderly** — Automatic scam call detection without requiring technical knowledge
- **Everyone** — Minimizing disturbance from spam and telemarketing calls

The name "Kalkan" means "Shield" in Turkish, reflecting the app's protective purpose.

## How Kalkan Works

Kalkan operates through Apple's iOS Call Directory Extension system:

1. **Database Download**: Kalkan downloads a comprehensive database of known spam phone numbers to the user's iPhone
2. **iOS System Integration**: The database is loaded into iOS via the Call Directory Extension API
3. **Call Checking**: When a call comes in, iOS checks the incoming number against the loaded database
4. **Blocking or Flagging**: Known spam numbers are either blocked entirely or flagged with a "Spam" label
5. **User Reporting**: Users can report suspicious numbers via Communication Reporting Extension

### Technical Details
- All processing happens locally on the device — no server-side call interception
- iOS does not allow real-time call analysis; Kalkan uses a preloaded database approach
- The database is regularly updated when the user opens the app
- No internet connection required for call blocking after initial database download
- Compatible with iPhone running iOS 16.0 or later

## Key Features

### Spam Protection (Free)
Automatically blocks known spam numbers using a regularly updated database. The database includes Turkish spam numbers, telemarketing numbers, and known scam numbers.

### Caller Identification (Free)
Shows information about unknown incoming calls. If a number is in the database, it displays a label so users know the nature of the call before answering.

### Extra Protection (Currently Free)
An advanced protection layer that blocks extended number patterns beyond the standard spam list. Uses pattern matching to catch numbers that rotate frequently.

### Communication Reporting (Free)
Users can report suspicious numbers directly from the iOS Phone app or from within Kalkan. Reports help improve the database for all users.

## Privacy & Data Protection

Kalkan takes privacy seriously:

- **No contact access**: Kalkan never reads your address book or contacts
- **No call log access**: Your call history is never accessed or stored
- **On-device processing**: All call blocking happens locally on your iPhone
- **No data selling**: User data is never sold to third parties
- **KVKK compliant**: Fully compliant with Turkish Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK)
- **Minimal data collection**: Only reported numbers are sent to servers, and only when users explicitly choose to report

## Download

- **App Store**: https://apple.co/4cYKmRG
- **Price**: Free
- **Requirements**: iOS 16.0+, iPhone

## Blog Articles

### Spam Arama Engelleme (Spam Call Blocking)
https://kalkan.website/spam-arama-engelleme/
Guide on blocking spam calls on iPhone using Kalkan and built-in iOS features. Covers automatic blocking, Silence Unknown Callers, and manual blocking.

### Numara Sorgulama (Number Lookup)
https://kalkan.website/numara-sorgulama/
Free methods to look up unknown phone numbers including Kalkan caller ID, Google search, and complaint websites.

### Dolandırıcı Numara Tanıma (Scam Number Recognition)
https://kalkan.website/dolandirici-numara-tanima/
How to identify phone scam numbers. Covers urgency tactics, personal information requests, and foreign number fraud patterns.

### Bilinmeyen Numara Kimin (Who Is This Unknown Number)
https://kalkan.website/bilinmeyen-numara-kimin/
Methods to find out who an unknown number belongs to, including Kalkan caller ID, Google search, and WhatsApp profile checks.

### Sürekli Arayan Numara Engelleme (Blocking Persistent Callers)
https://kalkan.website/surekli-arayan-numara-engelleme/
How to block numbers that keep calling repeatedly. Covers Kalkan automatic blocking, manual iPhone blocking, and Do Not Disturb mode.

### Kalkan Uygulaması Yayında (Kalkan App Is Live)
https://kalkan.website/kalkan-uygulamasi-yayinda/
Announcement of Kalkan's App Store launch. Overview of all features and target user groups.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Is Kalkan free?**
A: Yes. General Protection, Caller Identification, and Communication Reporting features are completely free. Extra Protection is also currently offered for free.

**Q: Does Kalkan work offline?**
A: Yes. The spam database is downloaded to the device and call blocking works without an internet connection.

**Q: Does Kalkan access my contacts?**
A: No. Kalkan never accesses your contacts, address book, or call history.

**Q: How does Kalkan block calls?**
A: Through iOS Call Directory Extension. Kalkan loads a preloaded spam database into the iOS system, which then checks incoming calls against it.

**Q: Is Kalkan suitable for elderly users?**
A: Yes. Kalkan automatically protects against scam and spam calls without requiring any user interaction after initial setup.

**Q: Does Kalkan do real-time call analysis?**
A: No. iOS does not allow third-party apps to perform real-time call analysis. Kalkan uses a preloaded database approach, which is Apple's approved method for call blocking.

**Q: What is Extra Protection?**
A: Extra Protection is an advanced blocking layer that uses pattern matching to block number ranges frequently used by spammers, beyond the standard individual number blocking.

**Q: How do I enable Kalkan after installation?**
A: Go to Settings → Phone → Call Blocking & Identification → Enable Kalkan. Then open the Kalkan app to download the latest database.

**Q: Can I report spam numbers?**
A: Yes. You can report suspicious numbers directly from the iOS Phone app or from within the Kalkan app. Reports help improve protection for all users.

**Q: Is Kalkan available on Android?**
A: Currently, Kalkan is only available for iOS (iPhone). There are no immediate plans for an Android version.
